Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 25, 2026

Tired Dad Fitness Club ("we", "us", or "our") is a fitness coaching application for dads. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information.

Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly, including:

  • Your name, current weight, and fitness goals
  • Food preferences and dietary restrictions
  • Training preferences and available equipment
  • Daily check-in responses (calorie adherence, workout completion)
  • Weight logs, step counts, and sleep data you enter or sync

Third-Party Integrations

If you choose to connect your Oura Ring account, we access the following data from Oura's API with your explicit authorization:

  • Daily sleep data (total sleep, REM, deep sleep)
  • Daily activity data (steps, active calories)
  • Readiness scores and HRV data

This data is used solely to populate your in-app dashboard and inform your coaching experience. We do not sell or share this data with third parties. Your Oura access token is stored locally on your device and is never stored on our servers.

AI Coaching

Our coaching feature uses the Anthropic Claude API. Messages you send to the coach, along with your goal summary and meal plan, are transmitted to Anthropic's API for processing. Please review Anthropic's Privacy Policy for details on how they handle data.

Data Storage

All personal fitness data is stored locally on your device using your browser's localStorage. We do not operate a database storing your personal information.

Data Sharing

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties, except as described in the AI Coaching and Third-Party Integrations sections above.

Children's Privacy

Tired Dad Fitness Club is intended for adults 18 and older. We do not knowingly collect data from children under 13.

Contact

Questions? Email us at erick.stevens@gmail.com.
